metadata.description: Tokenizer Fairness Gini coefficient measures equitable treatment across languages
metadata.formula: TFG = Σᵢ Σⱼ |c_i - c_j| / (2 * n² * μ)
metadata.interpretation: Lower values indicate more equitable treatment (0 = perfect equality)

metadata.description: Lorenz curve data for visualizing tokenizer fairness
metadata.x_axis: Cumulative proportion of languages (sorted by efficiency)
metadata.y_axis: Cumulative proportion of total token cost
